file_name: Australian Meat Group - Killara - Third-party questionnaire - April 2026.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if AMG and Killara are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with AMG and/or Killara.
